---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or issue in the project
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## Screenshots / Logs
If applicable, add screenshots, error logs, or console output to help explain your problem.

## Environment
 - **OS**: [e.g. macOS, Windows, Linux]
 - **Browser/App Version**: [e.g. Chrome 120, App v2.1.0]
 - **Device**: [e.g. Desktop, iPhone 14]

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.

- [ ] I'm willing to contribute a fix for this bug
- [ ] This issue is blocking my workflow

---

**Related Issues**: (List any related issues here)
